#pragma once
// generated by cantlrtool https://github.com/DataDriven-CAM/antlr4-thresher.git

{block_comment}

#include <stdlib.h>
#include <cmath>
#include <iomanip>
#include <iostream>
#include <exception>
#include <string>
#include <iterator>
#include <locale>
#include <codecvt>
#include <cstring>
#include <cwchar>
#include <functional>
#include <stack>

#include "parse/u16ncmp.h"

#include "graph/container/compressed_graph.hpp"
{token_vocab_include}

namespace {namespace} {{

    enum LEXER_TOKEN {{
{tokens}
    }};

    enum MODE{{
{modes}
    }};

    struct ast_node{{
      const char16_t* start;
      const char16_t* stop;
      LEXER_TOKEN token_start;
      LEXER_TOKEN token_end=LEXER_ROOT;
      MODE mode=MODE::DEFAULT;
    }};


    using LG = graph::container::compressed_graph<int, ast_node>;

    struct lexer_matchings{{
        bool success = false;
        size_t next_char_index = 0;
        std::string_view token_text;
        LEXER_TOKEN token;
    }};

    struct lexer_tracker_key{{
        size_t char_index;
        const std::vector<ast_node>* rule_address;
        bool operator==(const lexer_tracker_key& o) const {{
            return char_index == o.char_index && rule_address == o.rule_address;
        }}
    }};

    struct lexer_tracker_hash{{
        std::size_t operator()(const lexer_tracker_key& k) const {{
            return std::hash<size_t>{{}}(k.char_index) ^ (std::hash<const std::vector<ast_node>*>{{}}(k.rule_address) << 1);
        }}
    }};

    using LexerCacheTable = std::unordered_map<lexer_tracker_key, lexer_matchings, lexer_tracker_hash>;

    class {class} {super_class}{{
    protected:
        LG dagGraph;
        std::vector<ast_node> vertices{{{vertex_list}}};
        std::vector<std::tuple<graph::vertex_id_t<LG>, graph::vertex_id_t<LG>, int>> edges;
        std::stack<size_t> associates;
        MODE mode = DEFAULT;
        MODE nextMode = DEFAULT;
        bool pushable=false;
        bool poppable=false;
        bool skippable=false;
        std::vector<MODE> currentMode{{{{mode}}}};
        std::wstring_convert<std::codecvt_utf8_utf16<char16_t>, char16_t> cv;
        
        {token_vocab_class} {token_vocab_instance};
    
    public:
        {class}(){{
{edge_list}            
        }};
        {class}(const {class}& orig) = delete;
        virtual ~{class}() = default;

        //lexer rules
{lexer_rules}

        //parser rules
{parser_rules}

    void operator()(std::u16string& utf16, std::function<void(LG& dagGraph)> apply){{
        std::u16string::const_iterator it = utf16.begin();
        int count=0;
        int depth=0;
        itBegin=utf16.begin();
        itEnd=utf16.end();
        std::u16string::const_iterator temp=it;
        //vertices.clear();
        associates.push(vertices.size());
        vertices.push_back({{.start=&(*it), .stop=&(*it), .token_start=LEXER_ROOT}});
        LexerCacheTable cache;
        while(it!=utf16.end()){{
            lexer_matchings bestMatch{{false, 0, {{}}, LEXER_ROOT}};
{lexer_ladder}
            if (bestMatch.success) {{
                if(!winningSkippable){{vertices.push_back({{.start=&(*temp), .stop=&(*winningIt), .token_start=winningToken}});
                    edges.push_back(std::make_tuple(vertices.size()-2, vertices.size()-1, 1));
                }}
                skippable=false;
                it=winningIt;
                if(winningPushable)pushMode(winningMode);if(winningPoppable)popMode();count++;

            }}
            else {{
                break;
            }}
        }}
{parser_ladder}
            std::sort(edges.begin(), edges.end(), [](std::tuple<graph::vertex_id_t<LG>, graph::vertex_id_t<LG>, int>& a, std::tuple<graph::vertex_id_t<LG>, graph::vertex_id_t<LG>, int>& b){{if(std::get<0>(a)!=std::get<0>(b)){{return std::get<0>(a)<std::get<0>(b);}} return std::get<1>(a)<std::get<1>(b);}});
            using value = std::ranges::range_value_t<decltype(edges)>;
            graph::vertex_id_t<LG> N = static_cast<graph::vertex_id_t<LG>>(graph::vertices(dagGraph).size());
//            dagGraph.reserve_vertices(vertices.size());
//            dagGraph.reserve_edges(edges.size());
            dagGraph.load_edges(edges, [](const auto& c) -> graph::copyable_edge_t<size_t, int>{{
                return {{std::get<0>(c), std::get<1>(c), std::get<2>(c)}};
              }});
            dagGraph.load_vertices(vertices, [&](const ast_node& nm) -> graph::copyable_vertex_t<graph::vertex_id_t<LG>, ast_node>{{
                auto uid = static_cast<graph::vertex_id_t<LG>>(&nm - vertices.data());
                return {{uid, nm}};
              }});
            apply(dagGraph);
    }};

    void pushMode(MODE mode){{
        currentMode.push_back(mode);
        this->mode=mode;
    }};

    void popMode(){{
        if(currentMode.size()>1){{
            currentMode.pop_back();
            mode=currentMode.back();
            poppable=false;
        }}
    }};

    std::u16string::const_iterator itBegin;
    std::u16string::const_iterator itEnd;
    bool EndOfFile(std::u16string::const_iterator& it){{
        return it==itEnd;
    }};


    }};
}}
